inputs.srepr: Mul(Symbol('C_J', positive=True, real=True), Symbol('J', positive=True, real=True), Pow(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True), Integer(-2)), sin(Symbol('theta', positive=True, real=True)))

output.srepr: MutableDenseMatrix([[Mul(Integer(2), Symbol('C_J', positive=True, real=True), Symbol('J', positive=True, real=True), Pow(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True), Integer(-3)), cos(Symbol('theta', positive=True, real=True)))], [Mul(Symbol('C_J', positive=True, real=True), Symbol('J', positive=True, real=True), Pow(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True), Integer(-3)), sin(Symbol('theta', positive=True, real=True)))]])

method: curl of W_phi = C_J J sin(theta)/r^2 in spherical coords
scope: dipole vector ansatz with symbolic C_J
